Billing inquiry: For billing-related queries, please check your invoice or payment history. If you were charged incorrectly, our accounts team can assist further.
Cancellation request: Your order can be cancelled before it is shipped. Please provide your Order ID so we can process the cancellation request.
Product inquiry: For product-related questions, please share the product name or issue so we can assist you with details, warranty, or replacement options.
Refund request: Refunds are processed within 5–7 working days after approval. Please provide your Order ID if you have already initiated a return.
Technical issue: For technical issues, try restarting or reinstalling the application. If the problem continues, we will escalate it to the technical support team.
